objects: a tall totem of bones and skulls
prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile shows a DIFFERENT huge towering object as the clear MAIN SUBJECT — prominent, detailed and standing tall, on only a small low patch of packed brown dirt. The object dominates and fills the tile; keep the ground base minimal and thin — NOT a tall dirt pedestal or block with a small object on top. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a colossal rock-capped dirt pillar 2) a towering wind-carved hoodoo 3) a tall ruined clay tower 4) a towering mud-brick ziggurat 5) a giant dead cypress 6) a tall crumbling adobe tower 7) a wind-worn dirt spire 8) a tall totem of bones and skulls 9) a towering dirt-and-rock butte 10) a massive gnarled dead tree. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
